ddls:
CREATE TABLE "commands" (
  "command_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each command */,
  "command_name" TEXT /* Name of the command */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of command (e.g., ac, adtc) */,
  "argument_format" TEXT /* Format of the argument */,
  "response_format" TEXT /* Format of the response */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the command */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the command */,
  "command_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command group to which the command belongs */,
  "isDeprecated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the command is deprecated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the command */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the command */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current version of the command */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("command_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commands_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES command_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commands_command_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_group_id") REFERENCES command_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each command type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the command type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the command type */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the command type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the command type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "arguments" (
  "argument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each argument */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command the argument belongs to */,
  "argument_name" TEXT /* Name of the argument */,
  "argument_format" TEXT /* Format of the argument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the argument */,
  "isOptional" INTEGER /* Indicates if the argument is optional */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the argument */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the argument */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the argument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("argument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_arguments_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command the response belongs to */,
  "response_name" TEXT /* Name of the response */,
  "response_format" TEXT /* Format of the response */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the response */,
  "isError" INTEGER /* Indicates if the response is an error response */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the response */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sd_cards" (
  "sd_card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SD card */,
  "sd_card_name" TEXT /* Name of the SD card */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the SD card */,
  "sd_card_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of SD card */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the SD card */,
  "manufactured_date" TEXT /* Date of manufacture */,
  "warranty_expiration_date" TEXT /* Warranty expiration date */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the SD card is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the SD card */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the SD card */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sd_card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sd_cards_sd_card_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("sd_card_type_id") REFERENCES sd_card_types ("sd_card_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_execution" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each execution */,
  "sd_card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SD card the command was executed on */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command executed */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date the command was executed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the command execution */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the command */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Exact time of command execution */,
  "execution_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the command execution in milliseconds */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the command execution was successful */,
  "error_code" TEXT /* Error code if the command failed */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the command failed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the execution record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the execution record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_execution_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_execution_sd_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("sd_card_id") REFERENCES sd_cards ("sd_card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_execution_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the user record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the user record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the command data */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the command data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command execution if applicable */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the access log */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_execution_id FOREIGN KEY ("execution_id") REFERENCES command_execution ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of release */,
  "is_latest" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the latest version */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_versions_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sd_card_types" (
  "sd_card_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SD card type */,
  "sd_card_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the SD card type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the SD card type */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the SD card type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the SD card type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sd_card_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_sd_card_compatibilities" (
  "compatibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compatibility */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command */,
  "sd_card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SD card */,
  "compatibility_status" TEXT /* Status of the compatibility (e.g., compatible, not compatible) */,
  "compatibility_date" TEXT /* Date when the compatibility was determined */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the compatibility record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the compatibility record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compatibility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_sd_card_compatibilities_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_sd_card_compatibilities_sd_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("sd_card_id") REFERENCES sd_cards ("sd_card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_execution_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the execution */,
  "result_name" TEXT /* Name of the result */,
  "result_value" TEXT /* Value of the result */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of the result (e.g., success, error) */,
  "is_critical" INTEGER /* Indicates if the result is critical */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_execution_results_execution_id FOREIGN KEY ("execution_id") REFERENCES command_execution ("execution_id")
)
